2606.27009.title: Semantic Early-Stopping for Iterative LLM Agent Loops
2606.27009.paper_summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) loops, for example a Writer that drafts and a Critic that revises, are almost always terminated by a fixed iteration cap (max_iterations). This is a syntactic kill-switch: it is blind to whether the answer is still improving, so it over-spends tokens on easy inputs and truncates hard ones. We study semantic early-stopping: the loop halts when consecutive draft embeddings stop changing in meaning (cosine distance with a patience window) and the answer's measured quality stops improving. Our work makes three contributions. First, an honest theoretical footing: we prove deterministic termination and well-definedness and machine-check these claims, while treating the convergence of the distance sequence as an empirically tested conjecture rather than a (previously over-claimed) Banach contraction. Second, a judge-efficient evaluation protocol: we generate each question's full trajectory once, replay every stopping policy over the identical drafts, and cache every LLM-judge call, yielding a strictly paired efficiency-versus-quality comparison at low cost; we further separate operational tokens (charged to a policy) from evaluation tokens (a measurement instrument). Third, an empirical study on multi-hop retrieval-augmented question answering (HotpotQA). On the 60-question test split, a judge-free semantic stopper reduces operational tokens by 38% relative to max_iterations at parity quality (Delta-IS = -0.004, p = 0.81), whereas the full quality-gated variant is counter-productive because its per-round judging dominates cost. An oracle that selects the best round attains +0.115 Information Score over every practical policy (p ~ 4e-11), reframing the problem from "when to stop" (easy) to "which round is best" (open).
2606.27009.paper_summary_zh: 多代理大型語言模型（LLM）迴圈，例如一個撰寫者草擬和一個評論者修訂，幾乎總是由固定的迭代上限（max_iterations）終止。這是一個語法上的殺開關：它對答案是否仍在改善視而不見，因此在簡單輸入上過度消耗標記，並截斷困難的輸入。我們研究語義早停：當連續的草擬嵌入在意義上停止變化（使用耐心窗口的餘弦距離）且答案的測量質量停止改善時，迴圈將停止。我們的工作有三個貢獻。首先，誠實的理論基礎：我們證明了確定性終止和良好定義性，並對這些主張進行機器檢查，同時將距離序列的收斂視為經驗上測試的猜想，而不是（先前過度聲稱的）Banach收縮。第二，一個評審高效的評估協議：我們每個問題的完整軌跡僅生成一次，重播每個停止策略於相同的草擬上，並緩存每次LLM-評審的調用，從而以低成本產生嚴格配對的效率與質量比較；我們進一步將操作標記（收費於策略）與評估標記（測量工具）分開。第三，對多跳檢索增強問題回答（HotpotQA）的實證研究。在60題測試分割中，無評審的語義停止器相對於max_iterations在質量相當的情況下減少了38%的操作標記（Delta-IS = -0.004, p = 0.81），而完全質量門控變體則是適得其反，因為其每輪評審主導了成本。一個選擇最佳回合的神諭達到了+0.115的信息得分，超過每個實用政策（p ~ 4e-11），將問題重新框定為「何時停止」（簡單）到「哪一輪最好」（開放）。
2606.27009.author: Sahil Shrivastava et.al.
